_comment: UK police forces, Police & Crime Commissioners (and PFCC variants), and joint procurement bodies. Hand-curated 2026-04-28 because none of these appear in the GOV.UK organisations API. Sources: Home Office list of police forces (England & Wales), Police Scotland and PSNI corporate registers. Aliases captured from real FTS publisher name variants observed in pwin-competitive-intel/db/bid_intel.db. Where bodies already exist on the master list (BTP, CNC, MoD Police, PSNI, IOPC, HMICFRS, Scottish Police Authority, GMCA, WYCA, SYMCA), this file appends new aliases via canonical_id merge rather than creating duplicates. Variants combining multiple forces (e.g. 'Kent Police; Essex Police') are intentionally NOT listed as aliases — they are ambiguous joint-procurement strings that cannot be assigned to a single canonical force without corrupting downstream analysis.
